inspection_scope: shadow persistent runtime report schema and module
validator dependency chain for stream -> scheduler -> persistent runtime -> artifact writer
partial write, duplicate writer, cycle identity, and false-safe count risk
live final guard and scale-up guard
test reproducibility and full unittest regression

hidden_defects.condition: completed_cycle_count can look repeated without explicit distinct cycle commit identities
hidden_defects.impact: operator or downstream artifact could over-trust stub cycle counts
hidden_defects.fix: cycle_commit_ids, distinct count, duplicate count, status, schema, validator, and negative test added

live_safety_impact: strengthened; all live and scale flags remain false
ux_impact: reduces operator confusion between stub cycle counts and real long-run evidence
profitability_impact: prevents duplicate stub cycles from feeding false maturity/profitability confidence
